back_translation: And these are the last words of David: 'The oracle of David son of Jesse, and the oracle of the man who was raised up on high — the anointed of the God of Jacob, and the sweet one of the songs of Israel.'
The Spirit of the LORD spoke in me, and His word was on my tongue.
The God of Israel said — the Rock of Israel spoke to me — 'One who rules over mankind righteously, who rules in the fear of God,
is like the light of morning when the sun rises, a morning without clouds, from the brightness, from the rain — grass from the earth.'
For is not my house thus with God? For an everlasting covenant He has made with me, arranged in all and secured. For all my salvation and all desire — will He not make it sprout?
But the worthless are all like thorns thrust away, for they cannot be taken in hand.
And the man who would touch them must be armed with iron and the shaft of a spear; and in fire they shall be utterly burned in their place.
These are the names of the mighty men whom David had: Josheb-basshebeth the Tahchemonite, chief of the Three; he was Adino the Eznite — against eight hundred slain at one time.
And after him Eleazar son of Dodo son of the Ahohite — among the three mighty men with David when they taunted the Philistines who were gathered there for battle, and the men of Israel went up.
He arose and struck the Philistines until his hand grew weary, and his hand clung to the sword; and the LORD wrought a great victory on that day; and the people returned after him only to plunder.
And after him Shammah son of Agee the Hararite; and the Philistines gathered into a troop, and there was there a portion of the field full of lentils; and the people fled from before the Philistines.
But he stood in the middle of the portion and defended it and struck the Philistines, and the LORD wrought a great victory.
And three of the thirty chief men went down and came at harvest time to David, to the cave of Adullam; and a troop of Philistines was camped in the Valley of Rephaim.
And David was then in the stronghold, and the garrison of the Philistines was then at Bethlehem.
And David longed and said, 'Who will give me water to drink from the well of Bethlehem that is at the gate?'

And the three mighty men broke through the camp of the Philistines and drew water from the well of Bethlehem that is at the gate, and lifted it up and brought it to David; but he was not willing to drink it, and he poured it out to the LORD.

And he said, 'Far be it from me, O LORD, from doing this. Is it not the blood of the men who went at the risk of their lives?' And he was not willing to drink it. These things the three mighty men did.
And Abishai the brother of Joab son of Zeruiah, he was chief of the Three; and he wielded his spear against three hundred slain, and he had a name among the Three.
From the Three was he not most honored? And he became their commander, but unto the Three he did not come.

And Benaiah son of Jehoiada, son of a man of valor, great of deeds from Kabzeel; he struck down two champions of Moab; and he went down and struck down the lion in the midst of the pit on the day of snow.

And he struck down an Egyptian man, a man of appearance; and in the Egyptian's hand was a spear; and he went down to him with a club, and snatched the spear from the hand of the Egyptian, and killed him with his own spear.
These things Benaiah son of Jehoiada did, and he had a name among the three mighty men.
Of the Thirty he was honored, but to the Three he did not come; and David appointed him over his bodyguard.
Asahel the brother of Joab was among the Thirty; Elhanan son of Dodo of Bethlehem.
Shammah the Harodite, Elika the Harodite.
Helez the Paltite, Ira son of Ikkesh the Tekoite.
Abiezer the Anathothite, Mebunnai the Hushathite.
Zalmon the Ahohite, Maharai the Netophathite.
Heled son of Baanah the Netophathite, Ittai son of Ribai from Gibeah of the sons of Benjamin.
Benaiah the Pirathonite, Hiddai from the brooks of Gaash.
Abi-albon the Arbathite, Azmaveth the Barhumite.
Eliahba the Shaalbonite, the sons of Jashen, Jonathan.
Shammah the Hararite, Ahiam son of Sharar the Ararite.
Eliphelet son of Ahasbai son of the Maacathite, Eliam son of Ahithophel the Gilonite.
Hezrai the Carmelite, Paarai the Arbite.
Igal son of Nathan from Zobah, Bani the Gadite.
Zelek the Ammonite, Naharai the Beerothite, the armor-bearer of Joab son of Zeruiah.
Ira the Ithrite, Gareb the Ithrite.
Uriah the Hittite. All thirty and seven.
